title: 200 Pieces Pearl Pins for Flowers, Wedding, Scarf, Corsage, Quilting, Bouquets, Crafts, Sewing Decorations, DIY Dressmaking With Plastic Box
features: ⭐【200 Pieces】 Each set includes 200 pieces of straight pins with white pearl head, come with a plastic storage box. Safe and convenient to use.

⭐【Elegant Design】 The length of the straight pin is about 1.49 in (38 mm). The glossy pearl head is in the diameter of 0.157 in (4mm). This pin with round faux pearl head is very cute and elegant. Suitable length for floral arranging, wedding corsages, bouquets, brooch decoration.

⭐【Premium Material】our wedding bouquet pins are made of metal and plastic faux pearl material which is durable and sturdy, pointed end makes it easier to slide into flowers and fabrics, please note to keep them away from children to prevent being hurt by the pointed items

⭐【Measurement】The total length of each pin is approx. 0.4 cm/ 0.16 inches, and the diameter of the Faux Pearl measures approx. 3.2 cm/ 1.3 inches, proper sizes for various denominations, Easy and convenient to store in the box.

⭐【Wide applications】our bouquet pins are suitable for headdress bras, buttonholes, wedding decorations, flower arrangement, bouquets and other sewing or crafts with your creativity, wide range of usages and very practical
